title: Append Tool
preview: Safely append content from one file to another with confirmation.
name: append
description: Append the contents of one source file into a destination file after explicit confirmation. See #assets/payloads/FILEOPS/append.
outputs: Appends source file contents to destination file
Prints review, info, abort, error, and ok status messages

behavior.source_resolution: Uses $SRC if set, otherwise falls back to $1
behavior.destination_resolution: Uses $DEST if set, otherwise falls back to $2
behavior.confirmation_gate: Requires the user to type yes before writing
behavior.validation: Fails if the source file does not exist

notes: Designed for explicit file-to-file append operations
Suitable for controlled merges and manual review workflows

title: Cat-Append
preview: Interactive stdin capture and append to file.
name: catappend
description: Interactively append multi-line stdin content to a target file, with file selection fallback and append-only behavior. See #assets/payloads/FILEOPS/catappend.
outputs: Appends captured stdin to the chosen target file
Prints start, separator, and done messages

behavior.target_resolution: Uses $1 first, then fzf selection, then manual filename prompt
behavior.capture_mode: Reads stdin directly and appends it to the target file
behavior.safety: Never truncates or overwrites the target file
fallbacks: fzf selection when no filename is supplied
manual prompt when fzf returns nothing

notes: Requires an interactive terminal for the prompt flow
Best used when adding content to an existing file

title: Directory Auditor (daudit)
preview: Audit directory sizes with optional depth control.
name: daudit
description: Grid-style directory audit that reports directory sizes with optional max-depth control. See #assets/payloads/DIRECTORIES/daudit.

prompts: Enter max depth (Press Enter for Infinity)

notes: Name currently not printed in output

title: File Auditor (faudit)
preview: Scan files with icons and color output.
name: faudit
description: Live-stream file audit with extension-based icons. See #assets/payloads/FILEOPS/faudit.

title: Regex Finder
preview: Recursive grep search with regex support.
name: regfind
description: Recursive regex search using grep. See #assets/payloads/SYSTEM/regfind.

title: Shell Audit Logger
preview: Capture full shell environment into logs.
name: shell-audit
description: Audit shell environment and log to file. See #assets/payloads/SYSTEM/shell-audit.

title: Termux Shell Environment
name: termux-shell
description: Load a canonical Termux shell environment and hand off to bash. See #assets/payloads/FILEOPS/termux-shell.

title: Welcome to Infinity
preview: Learn how to use terminal helpers effectively.
